description: Fix formatting violations that cause npm run format:check (and npm run check) to fail on a clean checkout. Four files have formatting that does not match the Biome configuration.

userStories.title: Fix formatting violations in E2E test files and dev reload scripts
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want npm run format:check to pass on a clean checkout so that I can trust the CI checks reflect my changes, not pre-existing failures.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run format:check exits 0 with no formatting errors reported

The four previously-failing files (e2e/side-panel-data-flow.e2e.ts, e2e/side-panel-plugin-toggle.e2e.ts, platform/browser-extension/src/dev/reload-background.js, platform/browser-extension/src/dev/reload-client.js) produce no diff when checked by biome
userStories.notes: Run `npx biome format --write e2e/side-panel-data-flow.e2e.ts e2e/side-panel-plugin-toggle.e2e.ts platform/browser-extension/src/dev/reload-background.js platform/browser-extension/src/dev/reload-client.js` to auto-fix all formatting issues. The E2E files have double quotes that should be single quotes (per biome.json quoteStyle: 'single'), plus various line-wrapping differences. The two .js dev reload files have parenthesized single arrow function parameters that should be unparenthesized (per biome.json arrowParentheses: 'asNeeded'). These are the only changes needed — do NOT rewrite or restructure any logic. Verify the fix with `npm run format:check` (must exit 0 with no errors).
